Our Story

A New Era of
Refined Living

Situated on the gleaming stretch of SG Highway, Hotel Nexus One redefines luxury hospitality in Ahmedabad. Every corner is a testament to thoughtful design, impeccable service, and the warmth of Gujarati culture — elevated to its finest expression.


SG Highway, Satellite
Ahmedabad · Gujarat
Experiences

Beyond Accommodation

Fine Dining
An exquisite culinary journey through India's finest flavours, curated by our Executive Chef.
Wellness Spa
Rejuvenate your body and soul with ancient Ayurvedic therapies and modern wellness rituals.
Infinity Pool
A rooftop infinity pool offering panoramic views of Ahmedabad's glittering skyline.
★★★★★
"An experience that transcends the ordinary. Hotel Nexus One doesn't just offer rooms — it offers a philosophy of living, one golden moment at a time."
— Priya Mehta, Dubai · Verified Guest
